title: ContinuationPlan
description: `where to go next` pointer written by the `claw-compactor` plugin alongside every checkpoint. Stored at opencode+/opencode_claw/.compactor/sessions/<session_id>/plan.json. Unlike checkpoint files which are append-only (checkpoint.1.json, checkpoint.2.json, …), plan.json is rewritten on every compaction with the freshest plan. A resumed session reads plan.json to know which `next_actions` to execute first.

current_step.description: Position in the claw pipeline (1=discover, 2=classify, 3=detect, 4=draft, 5=log, 6=exit; see AGENTS.md §3).

next_actions.description: Concrete, ordered next steps phrased as imperatives.

blockers.description: Things that prevent progress (missing tools, failing health checks, unanswered questions).

assumptions.description: Working hypotheses that the resumed session should re-verify before acting on them.

checkpoint_ref.description: Path to the checkpoint that produced this plan.
